note.item: Fix: Corrected WebAuthn (Passkey) icon size distortion in Joomla Login Module
System: Added Independent Layout Control for Global Site and Component Area
System: Implemented Page Class Suffix Overrides (fluid-page, container-page, fluid-component, container-component)
System: Synchronized English and Portuguese translation ini files
System: Added native support for Bootstrap 5.3 Dark Mode with persistent client-side toggle
System: Integrated premium custom Font Manager in template parameters
System: Implemented native lazy loading for template logos
System: Audited template structure for Joomla 5/6 and modern standards compatibility
Performance: Fully removed legacy jQuery and jQuery Migrate dependencies, migrating completely to Vanilla JS
